# Live-derived from local IB Gateway 127.0.0.1:4002.
# Scenario: completed_orders, server_version=200.
# Raw evidence kept local:
# /tmp/ibkr-go-issue-6-7-captures/20260412T183937Z-completed_orders
# events.jsonl sha256 prefix: 889d6f7f0ea2308d
#
# The msg 101 payload below is the captured AAPL completed-order frame with
# account/order identifiers sanitized. It preserves the live server layout where
# CompletedStatus is "Cancelled by System:\n"; this field must not be decoded as
# filled quantity.
handshake {"server_version":200,"connection_time":"20260412 18:39:37 CET"}
server managed_accounts {"accounts":["DU12345"]}
server next_valid_id {"order_id":1001}
client req_completed_orders {"api_only":true}
raw server 
raw server AAAABDEwMgA=
disconnect
